content.text: The cryptocurrency market shows a wide range of asset values. Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) leads with a current price of $79,603.05, reflecting its close tie to Bitcoin's value. Wrapped Ethereum (WETH) follows with a price of $1,522.07, representing the tokenized version of Ethereum used in decentralized finance (DeFi) applications.

Solana (SOL), known for its high-speed blockchain capabilities, is currently priced at $112.78. Meanwhile, ai16z, a lower-value token, is trading at $0.1343, indicating its position as a smaller or emerging asset in the market.
